name: 忠心護主管家/下屬
description: 提利昂·拜拉席恩作為女主家族的管理者，在女主被欺負時出場震懾全場，是身份揭露的前哨——讓觀眾先嚐到一點爽感但又不完全揭露。

examples.drama_title: [FULL HD] She Married a Homeless CEO?! | Full Mini Drama HD | Romantic Comedy Series
examples.excerpt: Mr. Baratheon owns almost every building in the north. He's basically running the world here. / Shut up. You don't deserve to know who she is. / Be grateful that this lady has shown you mercy. Brats.
examples.context: 提利昂·拜拉席恩作為女主家族的管理者，在女主被欺負時出場震懾全場，是身份揭露的前哨——讓觀眾先嚐到一點爽感但又不完全揭露。
